# React Bits Waves provenance

This application includes an adapted, reduced-motion-aware canvas implementation based on the React Bits `Waves` component.

- Upstream: https://github.com/DavidHDev/react-bits
- Source: `src/ts-default/Backgrounds/Waves/Waves.tsx` and `Waves.css`
- Upstream commit: `f88bb89c588e8376235ea7a025485cfe532e0766`
- Retrieved: 2026-07-20
